meta.source: Bundled fallback when bufab-mcp dist/ is unavailable in the workspace. Prefer live MCP + ui_export for current tokens and constraints.

strict_constraints: No CSS linear-gradient or radial-gradient for UI fills (anti-pattern AP-03); use flat palette tokens only.
Border radii beyond the approved discrete scale are blockers (AP-04 — use Bufab spacing/radius tokens).
No ad-hero scroll listeners attaching to header scroll that fight layout/accessibility expectations (AP-05).
Do not use accent color tokens outside allowlisted placements (accent misuse — AP-06).
No custom web fonts loaded outside Bufab typography; font-family stacks must resolve to approved Roboto/system stacks (TYPE-01).
All visible hex fills must resolve to Bufab-approved palette tokens — no stray off-palette values (COLOR-03).
Before composing UI surfaces, fetch section specs via bufab-mcp ui_section_spec and tokens via ui_token.
For anything not listed above, ui_search MUST be used before committing non-trivial styling.
